product_overview: Backend API surface for MX Gestão Preditiva supporting canonical data, daily check-ins, store-level reporting, weekly feedback and operational automations. The endpoints expose authentication, store/team management, check-ins, benchmarks, reporting RPCs and administrative tools required by the operational backlog.
core_goals: Establish canonical domain and data model to reflect MX methodology (stores, sellers, check-ins, benchmarks, meta rules).
Provide reliable daily check-in flow with strong validation and vigência (submitted_at / reference_date) and clear 'sem registro' detection.
Deliver deterministic automated artifacts: matinal (daily) and weekly reports, WhatsApp message payloads and idempotent jobs.
Expose administrative reprocessing, audit logs and RLS/permissions so the core is auditable and secure.
Support manager and seller workflows (panels, feedback estruturado, PDI, trainings and notifications) via REST and RPC endpoints.

features.name: Authentication & Current User
features.description: Sign in users with email/password and retrieve authenticated user details to drive role-based behavior and RLS.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with access_token and refresh_token -> GET /auth/v1/user with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with user profile and roles
POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error message
GET /auth/v1/user without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Store Management (list/create/update)
features.description: List stores visible to the user and allow authorized roles to create or update store configuration used by matinal/weekly engines.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token -> POST /rest/v1/stores with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid store payload -> Receive 201 with created store -> GET /rest/v1/stores?select=* with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with list including created store
POST /rest/v1/stores without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
PATCH /rest/v1/stores with manager token but attempting to change global-only field -> Receive 403 Forbidden or 400 validation error

features.name: Daily Check-in (create, list, delete)
features.description: Record daily seller check-ins (separating submitted_at and reference_date) and provide listing and deletion for authorized operations and administrative repair.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with seller credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token -> POST /rest/v1/daily_checkins with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid checkin payload (reference_date, submitted_at, yesterday metrics, today agenda) -> Receive 201 with created record -> GET /rest/v1/daily_checkins?seller_user_id=eq.<id>&reference_date=eq.<date> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with created checkin
POST /rest/v1/daily_checkins with negative numeric fields or missing required fields and valid Authorization -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error explaining the failing rule

DELETE /rest/v1/daily_checkins?id=eq.<checkin_id> with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 204 No Content -> GET /rest/v1/daily_checkins?id=eq.<checkin_id> with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 200 with empty array
DELETE /rest/v1/daily_checkins?id=eq.<checkin_id> with Authorization: Bearer <seller_token> for a different seller -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Store Benchmarks (read/update)
features.description: Expose and allow authorized updates to per-store benchmarks (lead→agend, agend→visit, visit→sale) with auditability.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/store_benchmarks?store_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <manager_token> -> Receive 200 with benchmark row (defaults present if not overridden)

PATCH /rest/v1/store_benchmarks with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> and payload {store_id, lead_to_agend, agend_to_visit, visit_to_sale} -> Receive 204 No Content -> GET /rest/v1/store_benchmarks?store_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 200 with updated benchmark values
PATCH /rest/v1/store_benchmarks with Authorization: Bearer <manager_token> when manager lacks permission to change benchmark -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Store Meta & Delivery Rules (read)
features.description: Provide store meta rules (monthly goal, inclusion rules) and delivery rules (matinal/weekly recipients and WhatsApp group ref) needed by automation engines.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/store_meta_rules?store_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with store_meta_rules (monthly_goal, include_venda_loja_in_store_total, etc.)
GET /rest/v1/store_delivery_rules?store_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with delivery config including matinal_recipients and whatsapp_group_ref
GET /rest/v1/store_meta_rules without Authorization -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Feedbacks (create/list)
features.description: Record and list performance feedback entries used in structured manager routines and PDI history.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with manager credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token -> POST /rest/v1/feedbacks with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid feedback payload -> Receive 201 with created feedback -> GET /rest/v1/feedbacks?seller_user_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with feedback list including created record
POST /rest/v1/feedbacks with missing required managerial fields and Authorization -> Receive 400 Bad Request with field errors

features.name: PDI (create/list)
features.description: Create and list Performance Development Plans (PDI) entries to support multi-horizon goals, actions and monthly reviews.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with manager credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token -> POST /rest/v1/pdis with Authorization: Bearer <token> and complete PDI payload -> Receive 201 with created PDI -> GET /rest/v1/pdis?seller_user_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with created PDI
POST /rest/v1/pdis with seller token attempting to create PDI for another seller -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Training Progress (create/list)
features.description: Record and retrieve training progress per user; used to surface training pendencies and link trainings to identified gargalos.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with seller credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token -> POST /rest/v1/training_progress with Authorization: Bearer <token> and payload {training_id, user_id, status} -> Receive 201 Created -> GET /rest/v1/training_progress?user_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with training progress list
POST /rest/v1/training_progress with invalid training_id -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Notifications & Reads
features.description: List system notifications for a user and mark notifications as read to support manager/vendedor workflows and matinal/weekly alerts.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with seller credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token -> GET /rest/v1/notifications?user_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with notifications array -> POST /rest/v1/notification_reads with Authorization: Bearer <token> and payload {notification_id, user_id} -> Receive 201 Created
POST /rest/v1/notification_reads with Authorization: Bearer <token> and non-existent notification_id -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Memberships (list)
features.description: Expose memberships so frontends can determine which stores and roles a user has and apply the proper RLS and UI.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/memberships?user_id=eq.<id> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with list of memberships and roles
GET /rest/v1/memberships with expired token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Reprocessing Logs (administrative)
features.description: List reprocessing logs for auditing reprocess jobs and to support administrative repair workflows and idempotence checks.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/reprocessing_logs with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 200 with reprocess job history including status, rows_processed and warnings
GET /rest/v1/reprocessing_logs with manager token lacking global rights -> Receive 403 Forbidden if access restricted by RLS

features.name: RPC: Store Ranking
features.description: RPC to compute or retrieve current store ranking used by dashboards and matinal/weekly engines.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/rpc/get_store_ranking with Authorization: Bearer <token> and payload {store_id: <id>, period: <month>} -> Receive 200 with ranking payload (per-seller % of goal, ties handled per domain rules)
POST /rest/v1/rpc/get_store_ranking with missing store_id -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: RPC: Send Broadcast Notification
features.description: Administrative RPC to send broadcast notifications (used for matinal dispatches or admin announcements).
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/rpc/send_broadcast_notification with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> and payload {store_id, message, recipients} -> Receive 202 Accepted with job id
POST /rest/v1/rpc/send_broadcast_notification with manager token lacking broadcast rights -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: RPC: Verify System Health
features.description: RPC endpoint to check system health for monitoring and operational dashboards.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/rpc/verify_system_health with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with health status object (db_connection, last_job_status, queue_depth)
POST /rest/v1/rpc/verify_system_health with malformed payload -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: User Profile Update
features.description: Allow users to update their profile (name, contact, timezone) subject to validation and RLS.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with user credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token -> PATCH /rest/v1/users?id=eq.<user_id> with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid profile updates -> Receive 204 No Content -> GET /auth/v1/user with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with updated profile
PATCH /rest/v1/users with Authorization: Bearer <token> and invalid email format -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Auth Login
features.description: Sign in with email and password
